title: CodeReviewVerdict
description: Typed verdict of the four-pass code-review gate (epic b744), produced by `gate_dispatch.produce_code_review_verdict` running `gates/code-review.yaml`. Parallel to plan_review_verdict but for a DIFF. `blocking`/`advisory` are the kernel Pass-3 decided findings (kernel-shaped: finding/criteria/evidence/severity/decision); `coaching` are rendered Pass-4 move notes; `coverage` carries metrics + llm_ran (+ enabled:false on the inert disabled path). The capability is OFF by default; the verdict is the artifact the (source-separated) `review_code()` shim translates to a `review_result`.

verdict.description: BLOCK iff any blocking finding (or a fail-closed secrets/security detector — WS5); INDETERMINATE on LLM outage / mid-run degradation; else PASS (incl. the inert disabled path).

advisory.description: Surfaced advisory findings (Pass-3 decision=advisory) — coached by Pass-4.

coaching.description: Rendered Pass-4 affirmative coaching notes (deterministic move templates).

coverage.description: Run coverage: {llm_ran, metrics:{llm_ms,total_ms,llm_calls,...}}; enabled:false + llm_ran:false on the inert disabled path; degraded:<reason> on outage.

resolution_class.description: Systemic-degrade disposition (story blackbear): the closed resolution-class the LLM-failure classifier assigned. Present only on a degraded/INDETERMINATE verdict; absent on a normal verdict.

retryable.description: Whether resolution_class is transient/retryable (drives CLI exit 11); mirrors LLMOutcome.retryable.

diagnostic.description: Sanitized, redacted failure diagnostic (no secrets/PII); present with resolution_class.

runner.description: The runner backend that produced the verdict.

model.description: The model id (null when not applicable).
